pages.title: Activate First
pages.text: Waystones use activation visibility in this pack. Interact with a Waystone before relying on it as a destination; merely finding one is not enough.

pages.title: Crafted Waystone
pages.text: This standard recipe is shown live. Place permanent travel anchors where you can defend and identify them.

pages.title: Experience Cost
pages.text: Same-dimension travel scales with distance and the configured maximum is 27XP points.$(br2)Warp Plates and global targets are free.
